criteria.description: Desktop share now renders a QR surface and keeps the visible challenge link aligned with the current page URL instead of a hard-coded domain.
criteria.notes: The integration suite now asserts the desktop share area exposes a QR image, shows the current path in the challenge link text, and avoids duplicate visible challenge copy.

criteria.description: Mobile share handoff continues to work without the desktop QR, and copied share payloads now also resolve from the current runtime URL.
criteria.notes: The mobile regression checks still verify X/Wechat/Xiaohongshu/Douyin entry points, and the copied payload includes the current origin plus path instead of a fixed challenge URL.

criteria.description: The QR implementation stays local-only, the production bundle builds successfully, and WP01 is recorded as done in the mission status snapshot.
criteria.notes: The QR is generated with qrcode.react in the client bundle, the Vite build passed, and mission 017 materializes WP01 in the done lane.
